base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of proto_dungeon_enemy_variants — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. '(Proto)' unused dungeon enemies present in ROM. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
